description: Glucometer OCR - MicroCRNN FP16 TFLite, synthetic 7-segment

app_usage.1: User crops LCD region from photo using drag-box in app UI
app_usage.2: Resize crop to 128x32 grayscale, normalize to [0,1]
app_usage.3: Run TFLite inference -> softmax output (32, NUM_CLASSES)
app_usage.4: Greedy CTC decode -> value string + mean confidence score
app_usage.5: Unit (mg/dL or mmol/L) stored per-device by user on first use
